Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings
Off Calendar Oct-28-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Sharon Iskra, Esq. (304.345.6555; SIskra@baileyglasser.com) of Bailey & Glasser, LLP for Plaintiff.
Nancy McPherson, Esq. (925.222.3400; nmcpherson@wshblaw.com) of Wood Smith Henning & Berman LLP for Defendants, Earth Seeds LLC and Rachel Bolden-Kramer.
Emily Cunningham, Esq. (415.766.3200; ecunningham@hpylaw.com) of Hawkins Parnell & Young LLP for Defendant, Wonderschool, Inc.

ARGUED (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT WONDERSCHOOL, INC.'S Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings.

Defendant Wonderschool, Inc.'s motion to compel arbitration and a stay is granted.

[see word minutes for details.]

Order is signed.

Judge: Vedica Puri, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Yolanda Tanner, CSR# 12785, (424.445.6445; ytannercsr@gmail.com), Reported.. =(302/VP)
